embeds.title: Foundership Team
embeds.description: The Foundership Team holds **absolute and unrestricted authority** over The SnowHaven Empire. You are the founding members who built this server — its culture, rules, and direction are a reflection of your vision.

fields.name: 📋 Core Responsibilities
fields.value:
• Establishing and maintaining TSHE's long-term vision and culture
• Setting server-wide policy and overarching rules
• Final authority on all structural changes to the server
• Handling the most severe cases escalated from the Owner
• Approving or revoking leadership positions (Owner, Co-Owner)
• Managing major partnerships and external community relations
• Ensuring TSHE operates ethically and sustainably long-term

fields.name: 🔑 Admin Panel — Full Access
fields.value:
The Foundership Team has **master access** to the TSHE website admin panel. All site content, rules, punishments, staff guides, services, maintenance mode, and embed settings are controlled here.

**URL:** https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin
**Email & Password:** Set in your server's `.env` file.

⚠️ These credentials are **strictly confidential**. Never share, delegate, or write them in Discord.

fields.name: ⚡ Authority Overview
fields.value:
• Unrestricted server permissions — no exceptions
• Can override any decision made by any staff member
• Full access to all channels, logs, bots, and settings
• Can restructure the entire staff hierarchy
• Only the Foundership Team can dissolve or reform the server

fields.name: 🚨 When to Act Directly
fields.value:
Intervene only for exceptional circumstances:
• Existential threats — mass raids, legal issues, community crises
• Corruption or misconduct at Owner or Co-Owner level
• Major partnership agreements or structural collaborations
• Decisions that affect the identity or future of TSHE

For day-to-day matters: let the Owner and Co-Owner handle it.

fields.name: 📞 Escalation Chain
fields.value:
**Everyone → You**
There is no escalation above the Foundership Team. All final decisions rest here.

fields.name: 🌐 Key Links
fields.value:
🔗 [Admin Panel](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/admin) — Full site control
📜 [Rules Page](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/rules) — Community rules
🛡️ [Staff Guide](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/staff) — Public role guide
⚖️ [Appeal System](https://appeal.gg/s/1466990155020898413) — Ban appeals
⚠️ [Punishment Guide](https://tshe.noxxbot.com/punish) — Tier reference

footer.text: TSHE Leadership Guide — Foundership Team • tshe.noxxbot.com/staff
